methods.description: Process for determining the geological context through field mapping, sedimentary structure analysis, and stratigraphic comparison.

steps.description: Geological context was determined by standard field mapping of the exposure and outcrop.
steps.searchable_summary: perform field mapping to determine geological context

steps.description: Primary sedimentary structures, including dip direction, were recorded for the construction of wind roses.
steps.searchable_summary: record sedimentary structures and construct wind roses

steps.description: Samples were obtained for transmitted light microscopy.
Facies were described through analysis of the sediment grain characteristics and carbonate diagenetic signature.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze sediment grain characteristics and carbonate diagenetic signature

steps.description: Stratigraphic comparison was performed to a dated site ~1 km distant (Castle Rock), and to the seaward cordon of the Wilderness Embayment.
steps.searchable_summary: perform stratigraphic comparison with nearby sites

methods.description: Procedure for mapping track-bearing surfaces and recording measurements using a grid system, GPS, and photogrammetry.

steps.description: During the course of five site visits in 2016, a grid system was employed to create a sketch map of the track-bearing surfaces, along with a numbering system for the tracks.
steps.searchable_summary: create sketch map of track-bearing surfaces using grid system

steps.description: Photographs, Global Positioning System readings and compass bearings were obtained.
steps.searchable_summary: collect photographs, GPS readings, and compass bearings

steps.description: Track and trackway measurements were recorded, and a cave survey was performed.
steps.searchable_summary: record track measurements and perform cave survey

steps.description: The tracks on the lower layer were measured in 2017.

methods.description: Use of photogrammetry to create point clouds and digital terrain models, and production of a track surface map.

steps.description: Photogrammetry was performed using a Canon PowerShot ELFPH 340 HS camera.
Point clouds and digital terrain models were compiled using Agisoft Photoscan Professional (v.1.0.4) and colour topographic profiles were created with CloudCompare (v.2.6.3.beta).
steps.searchable_summary: compile point clouds and digital terrain models using Agisoft and CloudCompare

steps.description: A track surface map was produced.
